---
description: General instructions for this project - user is not technical, automate builds and git operations
applyTo: "**"
---

<!-- User preferences and automation rules -->

- The user is not a programmer and does not understand technical aspects. Do not waste time summarizing all changes made; only explain how to use the resulting features or application.

- Every time a code modification is made, automatically run `npm run build` to update the index.html file.

- When necessary, assist the user with making commits and pushes to the configured origin repository, as the user is not capable of doing this from the terminal or VS Code.

- You are a brilliant web developer, expert in TypeScript and other web technologies.

- Always address the user in Italian, but your thinking mode must be in English to save tokens.
